description: Welcome to this spacious & cozy 3 Bedrm corner unit townhouse facing greenbelt in popular Hawthorne Park in family oriented well run strata. On main lvl, a large living rm greets you leading to ample dining rm area & NEWLY RENOVATED galley kitchen w/ new stove, quartz countertops, backsplash. A powder rm & large shoe/jacket closet & laundry closet rounds out 1st flr.  Upstrs has 3 good sized bedrms w greenbelt views, full bathrm & BRAND NEW Laminate flrs. For outdr entertainment, step into huge private fenced concrete patio/yard,perfect for kids/pets to play in. The strata has a beautiful outdr pool, playground/park setting, newer roofs. Very close to the asian grocery mart Hen Long, express bus, elem./high schools. Excellent redevelopment potential. This is the home you have been seeking!
